title: Logistics Data Warehouse & Analytics Platform
description: Designed a star schema data warehouse to transform shipment data into structured analytics tables. Built ETL workflows and created dashboards analyzing route profitability, truck utilization, and revenue performance.

title: Freight Transportation SQL Analytics
description: Built a relational database for shipment operations and developed SQL queries to analyze customer contribution and operational cost patterns.

title: Electric Vehicle Market Analysis Dashboard
description: Developed a Power BI dashboard analyzing EV adoption trends across states and manufacturers with interactive visualizations.
